Repo.noReadme: No README available for this repository.

Footer.tagline: Discover trending open-source projects on GitHub. Track daily, weekly, and monthly rankings with real-time metrics.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Vetta ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.
Privacy.infoWeCollectDesc: We do not collect any personal information directly. Our website displays publicly available data from the GitHub API. We may collect anonymous usage data through standard server logs, including IP addresses, browser types, and pages visited for analytics purposes.
Privacy.cookiesDesc: We use essential cookies to provide core functionality such as theme preferences (light/dark mode) and language selection. These cookies do not track you across websites and are not used for advertising purposes.
Privacy.thirdPartyServicesDesc: We use the GitHub API to fetch repository data. Please refer to GitHub's Privacy Policy for information on how they handle data: https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-privacy-statement
Privacy.dataRetentionDesc: Repository data displayed on our site is cached from the GitHub API. We do not permanently store any personal user data. Server logs may be retained for up to 30 days for security and debugging purposes.
Privacy.yourRightsDesc: Since we do not collect personal data, there is typically no personal data to access, modify, or delete. If you have any concerns, please contact us.
Privacy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.
Privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By accessing and using Vetta ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
Terms.descriptionDesc: Vetta is a free web application that displays trending open-source repositories from GitHub. All data displayed is publicly available through the GitHub API.
Terms.useOfServiceDesc: You may use the Service for personal and commercial purposes. You agree not to misuse the Service, including attempting to disrupt, overload, or gain unauthorized access to our systems.
Terms.intellectualPropertyDesc: The repositories displayed on our Service are owned by their respective owners. Our website interface, design, and code are our intellectual property. Repository data is provided under each project's respective license.
Terms.disclaimerDesc: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the data displayed.
Terms.limitationDesc: We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the Service.
Terms.apiUsageDesc: Data displayed on the Service is fetched from the GitHub API and is subject to GitHub's rate limits and terms. Repository information may be cached and may not reflect real-time changes.
Terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
Terms.governingLawDesc: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws, without regard to conflict of law principles.
Terms.contactDesc: For questions about these Terms, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.

NotFound.title: 404 — Page Not Found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
